name: AIBOTICS, INC.
business: Aibotics, Inc. promotes the study of psychedelics for mental health treatments and, through the acquisition of Philon Labs assets, develops AI-powered robotic products such as the Phill Robot massage device and Milkyway smart refrigerator for breast milk storage. The company intends to deploy technology from its parent Ehave, Inc. for data collection in psychedelic research, and it has a supply agreement with HAVN Life Sciences for psilocybin active pharmaceutical ingredient.
sellsTo: consumers seeking home wellness products (Phill Robot) and modern parenting solutions (Milkyway)

exposures.sentence: Aibotics, Inc. promotes the study of psychedelics for the treatment of mental health issues and supports the creation of both natural and synthetic molecules for the development of appropriate treatments.
With this acquisition Aibotics began to shift its focus to the use of artificial intelligence in robotics to improve quality of life.
The Phill Robot, our flagship AI-powered massage robot uses advanced AI algorithms to learn and adapt to user preferences for a bespoke massage experience.

Since the reverse merger on January 20, 2021 (the Closing), the Company has been leveraging its relationship with its parent company, Ehave, Inc. (EHVVF) to integrate the use of digital and data therapeutics to measure the effect of Psylicibin and related compounds on mental health.

catalysts.event: Extension of supply agreement with HAVN Life Sciences for psilocybin supply
catalysts.sentence: On, October 28, 2022, we entered into an extension agreement with HAVN, extending the agreement for an additional two years from October 28, 2022, with automatic yearly renewals unless canceled on at least 30 days prior notice.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Philon Labs assets including Phill Robot and Milky Way intellectual property
catalysts.sentence: On November 28, 2024, Aibotics Therapies Inc. entered into an Asset Sale and Purchase Agreement (the Asset Purchase Agreement) and Intellectual Property Assignment Agreement (the IP Assignment) with Philon Labs, LLC (Philon Labs) for the acquisition of certain assets of Philon Labs including the intellectual property related to its Phill Robot and Milky Way products.

tamClaims.claim: The psychedelic drugs market will grow 12.4% annually over the next seven years, reaching $10.75 billion in 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: It has been estimated the psychedelic drugs market will grow 12.4% annually over the next seven years, reaching $10.75 billion in 2027.

tamClaims.claim: The US market for psychedelics could reach $6.85 billion in 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: The Petrie-Flom Center project the US market for psychedelics could reach $6.85 billion in 2027.
